notes.en: Refines AI Tasks with feature edit/delete, source document paths, copyable implementation instructions, improved layout, and a Maze experiment switch.
notes.zh-CN: 完善 AI Tasks：新增大功能编辑/删除、原始设计文档路径、实施指令复制、布局修复，并加入 Maze 实验开关。

en: Added AI Task feature editing and deletion with cascade cleanup.
Added source document paths and copyable implementation instructions for AI Task features.
Added CLI and MCP support for sourceDocPath, update_task_feature, and delete_task_feature.
Added a Maze experiment switch in Settings.
Split exported Ctrl_CC guidance into default memory and on-demand AI Task workflows.
Improved AI Tasks layout and restored shared modal behavior for task forms.
zh-CN: 新增 AI Tasks 大功能编辑和删除，并级联清理关联任务与事件。
新增大功能原始设计文档路径和可复制实施指令。
新增 CLI 与 MCP 对 sourceDocPath、update_task_feature、delete_task_feature 的支持。
新增 Settings 里的 Maze 实验开关。
将导出的 Ctrl_CC 指引拆成默认记忆工作流和按需 AI Task 工作流。
优化 AI Tasks 布局，并恢复任务表单的统一弹窗行为。
